title: ControlAgreementElections
description: A class to specify the Control Agreement election sby each party to the agreement.

controlAgreementAsCsd.description: The identification of whether the Control Agreement is a Credit Support Document with respect to each party.

consistencyWithControlAgreement.description: Unless specified as inapplicable in the event of any inconsistency between this Deed and the Control Agreement, this Deed will prevail over the Control Agreement.

relationshipWithControlAgreement.description: Unless specified as inapplicable the parties recognise that the Control Agreement is a means by which the parties can perform their obligations.
